name: Rescue Rush: Wildfire
description: Rescue Rush: Wildfire is a fast-paced survival game where every second counts. A lightning strike ignites a wildfire, and it’s up to you to save as many animals as possible before the flames spread out of control. Navigate the terrain, avoid hazards, and rescue animals while the fire grows more intense over time. Use water to protect yourself and extinguish flames, but stay alert—trees burn, paths change, and danger is always moving. Simple controls make it easy to jump in, while increasing pressure keeps every run challenging and rewarding. How long can you survive—and how many animals can you save?
